mapper.select: select bdi.biz_date as bizDate, bdi.day_status as dayStatus, bdi.cutoff_at as cutoffAt, bdi.sla_deadline_at as slaDeadlineAt, bdi.open_at as openAt, bdi.settled_at as settledAt, bdi.late_count as lateCount, bdi.catchup_count as catchupCount, coalesce(stats.total_job_count, 0) as totalJobCount, coalesce(stats.success_job_count, 0) as successJobCount, coalesce(stats.failed_job_count, 0) as failedJobCount, coalesce(stats.in_flight_job_count, 0) as inFlightJobCount from batch.batch_day_instance bdi left join ( select ji.tenant_id, jd.calendar_code, ji.biz_date, count(1) as total_job_count, coalesce(sum(case when ji.instance_status = 'SUCCESS' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as success_job_count, coalesce(sum(case when ji.instance_status in ('FAILED', 'PARTIAL_FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'TERMINATED') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as failed_job_count, coalesce(sum(case when ji.instance_status in ('CREATED', 'WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as in_flight_job_count from batch.job_instance ji join batch.job_definition jd on jd.id = ji.job_definition_id where ji.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and jd.calendar_code = #{calendarCode} and ji.biz_date = #{bizDate} group by ji.tenant_id, jd.calendar_code, ji.biz_date ) stats on stats.tenant_id = bdi.tenant_id and stats.calendar_code = bdi.calendar_code and stats.biz_date = bdi.biz_date where bdi.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bdi.calendar_code = #{calendarCode} and bdi.biz_date = #{bizDate}

select ji.job_code as jobCode, count(1) as totalJobCount, coalesce(sum(case when ji.instance_status = 'SUCCESS' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as successJobCount, coalesce(sum(case when ji.instance_status in ('FAILED', 'PARTIAL_FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'TERMINATED') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as failedJobCount, coalesce(sum(case when ji.instance_status in ('CREATED', 'WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as inFlightJobCount, coalesce(catchups.catchup_count, 0) as catchupCount from batch.job_instance ji join batch.job_definition jd on jd.id = ji.job_definition_id left join ( select tenant_id, job_code, biz_date, count(1) as catchup_count from batch.trigger_request where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and trigger_type = 'CATCH_UP' and request_status in ('ACCEPTED', 'LAUNCHED') and biz_date = #{bizDate} group by tenant_id, job_code, biz_date ) catchups on catchups.tenant_id = ji.tenant_id and catchups.job_code = ji.job_code and catchups.biz_date = ji.biz_date where ji.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and jd.calendar_code = #{calendarCode} and ji.biz_date = #{bizDate} group by ji.job_code, catchups.catchup_count order by ji.job_code asc
